use_cases: Trigger form submissions with primary action styling
Navigate between pages or views with link variant
Execute destructive operations with destructive variant styling
Provide secondary action options alongside primary buttons
Toggle interactive states with ghost and outline variants
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with class-variance-authority supporting multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Built on Radix UI Slot for composition, it provides accessible focus states and disabled handling. Designed for the meschacirung design system with Tailwind CSS styling, suitable for any SaaS, fintech, or general web application requiring form actions, navigation triggers, or interactive UI controls.
